items.title: Make your desk or nightstand powerful with Baseus’ 120W 6-in-1 USB-C charging station, now $25.50 (Reg. $50)
items.summary:
Baseus 120W 6-in-1 USB-C Desktop Charging Station

Buy for $25.50 (Reg. $50)

Apply code ESYFJBJI during checkout.

What we love

Outfitted with a total of six ports, this makes for a solid addition to a nightstand, desk, or even your travel kit. The six outputs are split with two USB-A and four Type-C. This is the right approach if you ask me, leaning mostly into USB-C with some room to fall back to USB-A when needed.

items.title: Add LEGO’s Star Wars 25th anniversary Tantive IV set for your display while it’s down at $49
items.summary:
LEGO Star Wars: A New Hope Tantive IV 25th Anniversary set

Buy for $49 (Reg. $64)

What we love

One of LEGO’s 25th Anniversary Star Wars builds, this set lets you recreate the very first ship ever seen in the movie franchise (watching them in release order) – the Tantive IV, AKA the Rebel Blockade Runner. Stacking up to 654 pieces, this micro-scale collectible set matches the movie’s iconic design, with 11 engines and turbo lasers.
